creator: freebsd@mnd.sc
text:
When the LUA module is not selected in the configuration, the source unpacking/patching phase of the build process fails:

===>  Patching for nginx-devel-1.12.0
===>  Applying extra patch /usr/ports/www/nginx-devel/files/extra-patch-ngx_http_echo_request_info.c
===>  Applying extra patch /usr/ports/www/nginx-devel/files/extra-patch-ngx_http_notice_module.c
===>  Applying extra patch /usr/ports/www/nginx-devel/files/extra-patch-ngx_http_lua_common.h
File to patch:
